presets.name: Generic Open Directory
presets.description: Find any open/exposed web directory listing

presets.name: Open Directory with Parent
presets.description: Classic open directory with parent directory link visible

presets.name: Open Directory - Videos
presets.description: Open directories containing video files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (mp4 OR mkv OR avi OR mov)

presets.name: Open Directory - Audio
presets.description: Open directories containing audio files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (mp3 OR flac OR wav OR ogg)

presets.name: Open Directory - Images
presets.description: Open directories containing image files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (jpg OR jpeg OR png OR gif OR raw)

presets.name: Open Directory - Documents
presets.description: Open directories containing document files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (pdf OR doc OR docx OR xls OR xlsx)

presets.name: Open Directory - Backups
presets.description: Open directories containing backup files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (bak OR backup OR old OR zip OR tar.gz)

presets.name: Open Directory - Config Files
presets.description: Open directories containing configuration files
presets.dork: intitle:"index of /" (config OR conf OR ini OR cfg OR env)

presets.name: Open Directory - Government Sites
presets.description: Open directories on government domains

presets.name: Open Directory - Education Sites
presets.description: Open directories on educational institution domains

presets.name: Apache Directory Listing
presets.description: Apache server auto-generated directory index pages

presets.name: Nginx Directory Listing
presets.description: Nginx server directory listing pages

presets.name: Exposed .env Files
presets.description: Find exposed environment variable files (may contain credentials)

presets.name: Exposed SQL Dumps
presets.description: Find exposed SQL database dump files

presets.name: Exposed Log Files
presets.description: Find exposed server or application log files

presets.name: Backup Files
presets.description: Find exposed backup files

presets.name: XML Config Files
presets.description: Find exposed XML configuration files

presets.name: SSL Keys / PEM Files
presets.description: Find exposed SSL private key files

presets.name: Exposed .htpasswd
presets.description: Find exposed Apache password files

presets.name: WordPress Config
presets.description: Find exposed WordPress configuration files

presets.name: Password Text Files
presets.description: Find plain text files containing passwords

presets.name: Generic Admin Login
presets.description: Find admin login portals

presets.name: phpMyAdmin
presets.description: Find exposed phpMyAdmin database interfaces

presets.name: cPanel Login
presets.description: Find cPanel web hosting login pages

presets.name: Cisco Router Login
presets.description: Find exposed Cisco router admin interfaces

presets.name: Axis Network Cameras
presets.description: Find Axis network cameras with live feeds

presets.name: Generic IP Camera Feed
presets.description: Find generic IP camera web interfaces

presets.name: Netcam / Webcam Interface
presets.description: Find webcam interfaces via URL pattern

presets.name: SQL Error Messages
presets.description: Find pages exposing SQL syntax errors (indicates injection vulnerability)

presets.name: PHP Error Messages
presets.description: Find pages with exposed PHP error output

presets.name: Stack Trace Exposure
presets.description: Find pages leaking application stack traces

presets.name: Subdomain Enumeration
presets.description: Find all indexed subdomains of a target domain

presets.name: Email Address Harvesting
presets.description: Find email addresses on a target site

presets.name: LinkedIn Employee Recon
presets.description: Find LinkedIn profiles of employees at a company

presets.name: GitHub Code Recon
presets.description: Find a company's code repositories and potential leaks on GitHub

presets.name: WordPress Sites
presets.description: Find WordPress-powered sites (can be combined with site:)

presets.name: Joomla Sites
presets.description: Find Joomla CMS-powered sites

presets.name: Drupal Sites
presets.description: Find Drupal CMS-powered sites

presets.name: Exposed API Keys
presets.description: Find pages or files containing exposed API keys
presets.dork: intext:"api_key" OR intext:"apikey" filetype:json OR filetype:yaml

presets.name: Confidential PDFs
presets.description: Find PDF documents marked as confidential
presets.dork: filetype:pdf intext:"confidential" OR intext:"not for distribution"

presets.name: Excel Files with Passwords
presets.description: Find Excel spreadsheets containing password data
